title: LSI Flight School
popupHtml:
LSI Flight School

Unlocks after the [Friends Reunited](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13985) mission. Earn a medal in each of the trials for progress towards 100% completion. **Trials:** - Training Take Off - Runway Landing - Inverted Flight - Knife Flight - Flat Hatting - Touch Down - Loop the Loop - Helicopter Course - Helicopter Speed Run - Skydiving - Drop Zone - Earn Your Wings
